titles.en: Chapter on the Reason for Neglecting Hajj
Chapter on the Reason for Neglecting Hajj

segments: : "مَا تَخَلَّفَ رَجُلٌ عَنِ الْحَجِّ إِلَّا بِذَنْبٍ، وَمَا يَعْفُو اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ أَكْثَرُ".
arabic.text: : "مَا تَخَلَّفَ رَجُلٌ عَنِ الْحَجِّ إِلَّا بِذَنْبٍ، وَمَا يَعْفُو اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ أَكْثَرُ".

segments:
Hadith.2862 - Abu Basir narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"No person refrains from performing Hajj except due to a sin, and what Allah (swt), the Exalted, forgives is greater."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2862 - Abu Basir narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"No person refrains from performing Hajj except due to a sin, and what Allah (swt), the Exalted, forgives is greater."

narratorChain.raw: رَوَى أَبُو بَصِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ قَالَ:

titles.en: Chapter on the Reason for Neglecting Hajj

segments: : سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ: "مَا مِنْ عَبْدٍ يُؤْثِرُ عَلَى الْحَجِّ حَاجَةً مِنْ حَوَائِجِ الدُّنْيَا إِلَّا نَظَرَ إِلَى الْمُحَلِّقِينَ قَدْ انْصَرَفُوا قَبْلَ أَنْ تُقْضَى لَهُ تِلْكَ الْحَاجَةُ".
arabic.text: : سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ: "مَا مِنْ عَبْدٍ يُؤْثِرُ عَلَى الْحَجِّ حَاجَةً مِنْ حَوَائِجِ الدُّنْيَا إِلَّا نَظَرَ إِلَى الْمُحَلِّقِينَ قَدْ انْصَرَفُوا قَبْلَ أَنْ تُقْضَى لَهُ تِلْكَ الْحَاجَةُ".

segments:
Hadith.2863 - Abu Hamzah al-Thumali narrated from Abu Ja'far (as), who said:
"I heard him say: 'No servant gives preference to a worldly need over performing Hajj except that he will see the pilgrims, having completed their rituals and shaved their heads, return before his need is fulfilled.'"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2863 - Abu Hamzah al-Thumali narrated from Abu Ja'far (as), who said:
"I heard him say: 'No servant gives preference to a worldly need over performing Hajj except that he will see the pilgrims, having completed their rituals and shaved their heads, return before his need is fulfilled.'"

narratorChain.raw: 2863 - وَرَوَى أَبُو حَمْزَةَ الثَّمَالِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ قَالَ
